prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.9 kg; Height 177.2 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 198mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.9kg; 9 months ago 74.1kg; 6 months ago 71.7kg; 3 months ago 68.7kg; current 75.9kg), Height (12 months ago 177.2cm; 9 months ago 177.2cm; 6 months ago 177.2cm; 3 months ago 177.2cm; current 177.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 51mg/g; 9 months ago 66mg/g; 6 months ago 70mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 64mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.2g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
